citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 2:15pm on February
19, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door, speaking with licensee's spouse, and
calling the number on file leaving a voicemail. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection
is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement
action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 2:15pm on February 
19, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door, speaking with licensee's spouse, and 
calling the number on file leaving a voicemail. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection 
is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement 
action. 
 
 
End Section
